goldenDemos.outcome: Agent user searches catalog, compares products, proposes add-to-cart, requests approval, mutates app-owned cart state, and emits observable workflow state.
acceptance: Uses browser-local cascade when available.
Searches catalog before product claims.
Does not mutate cart before approval.
Executes approved add-to-cart through host-owned app state.
Shows coherent fallback states when no model is available.

goldenDemos.outcome: Agent user searches accounts, evaluates role/policy context, proposes risky admin changes, gates them through approval, and records audit/telemetry.
acceptance: Respects role and permission state.
Searches account records before recommending changes.
Requires approval for plan changes and suspensions.
Records audit-worthy action details.
Keeps host app as source of truth.

goldenDemos.outcome: Agent user retrieves product knowledge, cites sources, refuses unsupported claims, and uses cascade/fallback states honestly.
acceptance: Uses retrieval before factual answers.
Cites sources for supported claims.
Refuses unsupported claims.
Identifies the runtime/model/assistant relationship accurately.
Does not reduce Edgekit to docs search in adoption answers.

goldenDemos.outcome: Agent user operates a small public site: answers grounded questions, explains its capability mode, uses browser-local cascade when available, and refuses unsupported identity/disambiguation claims.
acceptance: Known local-model browser does not stay in Basic mode.
User can understand and change capability/cascade mode.
Unsupported claims such as Ohio, robots, and rockets are refused.
Identity questions are answered from configured assistant/runtime identity.
No-model fallback is labeled as fallback, not the product experience.

goldenDemos.outcome: Agent user starts local, detects a task beyond local/basic capability, and escalates to an app-owned Worker/server route with explicit user-facing mode and telemetry.
acceptance: Local/browser mode handles bounded app tasks.
App-owned Worker handles tasks that need server capability.
User sees why escalation happened.
Handoff context is bounded and excludes secrets.
Telemetry records mode transition and outcome.

labs.purpose: Prototype first-visit and runtime mode-change UX for local model, WebLLM download, cloud fallback, and Basic fallback.
Start from an existing non-agent app and add only the smallest helper/tool surface needed for an agent user to complete workflows.
